summary: Completed testing of Smart Delivery System features (Driver Earnings, Smart Order Limits, Priority Orders). Backend APIs all working correctly (16/16 tests passed). Admin settings panel loads and displays all sections properly. Driver dashboard at /delivery/dashboard works with 11 available orders and map button visible. CRITICAL ISSUE: /delivery route not registered in App.js causing blank page.

integration_issues.issue: Route '/delivery' is NOT registered in App.js - only '/delivery/documents' and '/delivery/dashboard' exist. Bottom nav links to '/delivery' which shows blank page

action_items: Add Route for '/delivery' pointing to DeliveryHomePage in App.js (line ~118)
OR change bottom navigation links from '/delivery' to '/delivery/dashboard'
critical_code_review_comments: Missing route definition: DeliveryHomePage.js exists at /app/frontend/src/pages/DeliveryHomePage.js but has no route in App.js
Console warning observed: 'No routes matched location /delivery'

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Admin panel works, Driver dashboard works at /delivery/dashboard but /delivery route missing

seed_data_creation: None - using existing test data (7 food orders, 4 product orders available)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for smart delivery settings all working. Admin panel at /admin?tab=delivery-settings displays: Driver Earnings (base_fee, price_per_km, min_fee), Smart Order Limits (max_orders_different_stores, max_orders_same_store, priority_timeout_seconds, enable_smart_priority), Distance Delivery settings, and Wait Time. Driver dashboard at /delivery/dashboard shows map button and available orders. Fix needed: Add route for /delivery in App.js

working: PUT /api/settings/driver-earnings - Updates driver earnings (requires admin auth)
PUT /api/settings/smart-order-limits - Updates smart order limits (requires admin auth)
